pi_items.source: ActivInspire flipchart file format specification; task description line 6 specifies this save location
setup_task.sh creates this directory at line 8; task description line 6 specifies this path
Combination of verified directory and filename; task description line 6
Task description explicitly specifies 4 pages: Page 1 (Overview), Page 2 (Full Spectrum), Page 3 (Visible Light), Page 4 (Applications)
Task description specifies 'Page 2: A diagram with 7 colored rectangles arranged in order of wavelength'
NASA and multiple authoritative sources (Wikipedia, UCAR) confirm these are the seven standard bands of the electromagnetic spectrum
Standard ROYGBIV (Roy G. Biv) mnemonic for visible light colors confirmed by NASA Science, Britannica, and educational sources. Task description explicitly lists these colors for Page 3.

All verified as authentic applications: communication (radio), broadcasting (radio), cooking (microwave), radar (microwave), medical (X-ray), imaging (X-ray), cancer (gamma ray treatment), sterilization (gamma ray). Sources: NASA Science, educational physics resources, NCBI sterilization research.
Visible light wavelength range 380-700 nm confirmed by NASA Science and Britannica. Task description explicitly specifies 'Include wavelength reference text (e.g., "380 nm - 700 nm")'

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart reference document for the electromagnetic spectrum. The metadata specifies scientifically accurate content: (1) The seven standard EM spectrum bands (Radio, Microwave, Infrared, Visible, Ultraviolet, X-ray, Gamma) in order of increasing frequency/decreasing wavelength; (2) The visible light spectrum colors using the ROYGBIV mnemonic (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Indigo, Violet) with wavelength range 380-700 nanometers; (3) Real-world applications including radio communications/broadcasting, microwave cooking/radar, X-ray medical imaging, and gamma ray sterilization/cancer treatment. The file should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/em_spectrum_reference.flipchart and contain at least 7 shapes (rectangles) representing the spectrum bands.
